prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津大学在甘肃省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约4258名→1533名→1510名→1359名→1286名。2021年位次异常偏高（4258名），2022年起大幅前移 至1500名左右并持续小幅前移，2024年新高考改革后物理类位次进一步前移至1359名，2025年再前移至1286名，整体呈逐年前移趋势，近3年累计前移约224名，2025年基准位次约 1286名；该校在甘肃省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2024年均为42人，2025年增至44人，2026年大幅扩招至63人，较2025年扩招约43.2%。 扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取门槛，使最低位次数字明显增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第20名，近年 排名稳定在第20–22名区间，属于全国顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及PPT贬低其他专业引发争议、学生反映考试作弊问题后教务处回应不当等 事件，对报考热度有轻微抑制；2025年声誉中性/混合，主要讨论宿舍和食堂条件。抖音热度排名第66位（一般），短视频曝光量处于中等水平，无明显推高效应。；天津大学拥有20个A-及以上一级学科，其中化学工程与技术A+、管理科学与工程A+为顶尖王牌；仪器科学与技术A、光学工程A、动力工 程及工程热物理A、土木工程A、建筑学A、机械工程A等工科实力雄厚。招生专业中的工科试验班（智能与计算类）对应计算机科学与技术A-，工科试验班（电气信息类）对应电气 工程A-，工科试验班（精仪与光电信息类）对应仪器科学与技术A、光学工程A，均属优势学科覆盖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通 信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，人工智能相关方向热度持续上升，与天津大学工科试验班（未来技术学院、智能与计算类、电气信息类）等招生专业高度契合，对高分考 生吸引力强。甘肃省2026年高考总报名人数约218700人，较2025年大幅增长；按2024–2025年物理类占比（约65.7%–67.5%）估算，2026年物理类考生约145000–147000人，较2025 年物理类121443人增长约19.8%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；天津大学位于天津市，距甘肃省较远，属跨省报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招43.2 %（最大向下压力）、甘肃省物理类考生增长约19.8%（竞争加剧）、声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度、王牌专业高热推荐吸引高分考生等多重因素，在此 基础上考虑考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧效应，小幅上调15名。预测2026年天津大学在甘肃省物理类最低录取位次约1634名，区间1448–1820名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来技术学院）（含具身智能、人工智能、柔性电子、脑机接口、集成电路五大方向）
- 工科试验班（智能与计算类）（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（电气信息类）（电气工程及其自动化、电子信息工程、通信工程、自动化、机器人工程等）
- 工科试验班（精仪与光电信息类）（测控技术与仪器、光电信息科学与工程、电子科学与技术、智能感知工程）
- 工科试验班（智能装备设计与制造）（机械设计制造及其自动化、能源与动力工程、智能制造工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智慧环境与能源类）（环境科学、建筑环境与能源应用工程、环境工程）
- 工科试验班（智能水利）（港口航道与海岸工程、水利水电工程）
- 工科试验班（国家学科培优计划智慧与低碳化工类）（化学工程与工艺、精细化工、过程装备与控制工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1634名，区间1448–1820名。位次在区间下限（1448名）以内者可重点冲刺一档未来技术学院和智能与计算类等王牌专业；位次在预测值附近（约1634名）建议以二档 电气信息类、精仪与光电信息类为主力，兼顾冲刺一档；位次在区间上限（1820名）附近或略低者，建议以三档专业保底，同时可尝试二档专业。天津大学2026年大幅扩招，录取 机会较往年明显增加，但王牌专业竞争依然激烈。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin University in Gansu Province's Science/Physics category were approximately 4258 → 1533 → 1510 → 1359 → 1286. The ranking in 2021 was abnormally high (4258), but from 2022 onward it moved significantly forward to around 1500 and continued to move forward slightly. After the new college entrance examination reform in 2024, the Physics category ranking further advanced to 1359, and in 2025 it moved forward to 1286, showing a year-by-year forward trend. Over the past three years, it has cumulatively moved forward by about 224 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1286 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Tianjin University in Gansu Province's Science/Physics category: from 2021 to 2024, it was 42 students each year; in 2025, it increased to 44 students; in 2026, it significantly expanded to 63 students, an increase of about 43.2% compared to 2025. The significant expansion will directly lower the admission threshold, causing the minimum ranking number to increase noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 20th, with recent rankings stable in the 20–22 range, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversies such as PPTs disparaging other majors and inappropriate responses from the academic affairs office regarding student-reported exam cheating incidents, which have a slight dampening effect on application enthusiasm. In 2025, the reputation was neutral/mixed, mainly discussing dormitory and cafeteria conditions. Its Douyin popularity ranks 66th (average), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no significant boosting effect. Tianjin University has 20 first-level disciplines rated A- or above, with Chemical Engineering and Technology A+ and Management Science and Engineering A+ as top-tier strengths. Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Civil Engineering A, Architecture A, Mechanical Engineering A, and other engineering disciplines are strong. Among the enrollment majors, the Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligence and Computing) corresponds to Computer Science and Technology A-, the Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Information) corresponds to Electrical Engineering A-, and the Engineering Experimental Class (Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information) corresponds to Instrument Science and Technology A and Optical Engineering A, all covered by advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, with AI-related directions continuing to rise in popularity. This aligns well with Tianjin University's Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology College, Intelligence and Computing, Electrical and Information) and other enrollment majors, attracting high-scoring students. The total number of registered examinees for the 2026 Gaokao in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025. Based on the Physics category proportion in 2024–2025 (about 65.7%–67.5%), it is estimated that the number of Physics category examinees in 2026 will be about 145,000–147,000, an increase of about 19.8% compared to 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, which is far from Gansu Province, making it a cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the significant 43.2% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (maximum downward pressure), the approximately 19.8% increase in Physics category examinees in Gansu Province (intensified competition), the slightly negative reputation suppressing enthusiasm, and the high popularity of top majors attracting high-scoring students, a small upward adjustment of 15 places is made. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tianjin University in Gansu Province's Physics category in 2026 will be approximately 1634, with a range of 1448–1820.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology College) (including five directions: Embodied Intelligence, Artificial Intelligence, Flexible Electronics, Brain-Computer Interface, Integrated Circuits)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligence and Computing) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Information) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Automation, Robotics Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information) (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Perception Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Equipment Design and Manufacturing) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Environment and Energy) (Environmental Science, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Environmental Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Water Conservancy) (Port, Waterway and Coastal Engineering, Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National Discipline Cultivation Plan Smart and Low-Carbon Chemical Engineering) (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Fine Chemicals, Process Equipment and Control Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 1634, with a range of 1448–1820. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1448) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Future Technology College and Intelligence and Computing. Candidates near the predicted value (around 1634) are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Electrical and Information, Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information as the main focus, while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates near or slightly below the upper limit of the range (1820) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also trying Tier 2 majors. Tianjin University's significant expansion in 2026 increases admission opportunities compared to previous years, but competition for top majors remains intense.
